description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines the stages test and deploy and uses the python:3.6 Docker image for all jobs. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update -qy, then pip3 install -r requirements.txt, pip3 install pytest, and finally executes pytest. In the deploy stage add a pypi job that runs pip install -U twine, python setup.py sdist, and twine upload dist/* to publish the package. The pypi job should only run on tag pipelines (only: tags) and expose the TWINE_USERNAME and TWINE_PASSWORD variables for authentication. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
